"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sample1.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\clang64\bin\llvm-ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sample1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sample1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\clang64\bin\clang++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sample1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o sample1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsample1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\sample1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
